meta.description: Professional CV of Giovanna Parissi Reyes, Civil Engineer with 6+ years of experience in construction supervision for large-scale hotel projects in Cancún.

summary.label: About Me
paragraphs: Civil Engineer with over 6 years of experience in construction supervision and site residency for large-scale hotel projects along the Mexican Caribbean coast. Comprehensive expertise ranging from blueprint interpretation to estimation control, payroll management, and construction auditing.

Currently serving as site resident engineer for the Grand Hyatt Puerto Cancún hotel project, with technical expertise in finishes, drywall, pools, hydro-sanitary installations, and black iron piping. Proficient in AutoCAD and Neodata for progress tracking and quantity take-offs.

jobs.title: Supervisor / Site Resident / Quantity Surveyor
jobs.company: Grupo Constructor Cantepec S.A. de C.V.
bullets: Grand Hyatt Puerto Cancún Hotel (Sep 2022 – present) — Full site residency in finishes, restaurant, and pool areas.
Hotel Emporio KM.16, buildings B, C, and D — Supervision of masonry, drywall, finishes, pools, and restaurant areas.
Interpretation of structural, architectural, and hydro-sanitary blueprints.
Preparation of progress estimates and quantity take-offs.
Subcontractor payroll control and on-site material auditing.
Material quantity takeoffs and warehouse requisitions.

jobs.title: AA Supervisor / Security / Site Resident / Quantity Surveyor
bullets: Hotel Emporio Torre A — Supervision and site residency for hotel building construction.
Blueprint interpretation and technical specification verification.
Supervision of air conditioning (AC) and security system installations.
Supervision of black iron piping and fire suppression system installations.
Preparation of progress estimates and quantity take-offs.

jobs.title: Construction Supervisor
bullets: ZIVALAM and KALAM Residential Complexes — Supervision of residential housing construction.
Reading and interpretation of architectural and structural blueprints.
Material quantity takeoffs and requisition preparation.
Supervision of masonry, hydro-sanitary installations, carpentry, and finishes.
